import React, { useRef } from "react"; import emailjs from "@emailjs/browser"; import "./contact.css"; const Contact = () => { const form = useRef(); const sendEmail = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); // Simple client-side validation const formElements = e.target.elements; const name = formElements["from_name"].value.trim(); const email = formElements["from_email"].value.trim(); const message = formElements["message"].value.trim(); if (!name || !email || !message) { alert("All fields are required."); return; } emailjs .sendForm( "service_zi79jmg", // Your service ID "template_16l69q6", // Your template ID form.current, // Reference to the form element "ORQU9NGmBynjEGrQH" // Your public key ) .then( () => { e.target.reset(); alert("SUCCESS! Your message has been sent."); // Clear the form after successful submission }, (error) => { alert("FAILED... Please try again."); console.error(error.text); // Log error for debugging } ); }; return ( <>
